n: Instance: A Trap for the Creature

steps.t: Garbert has already prepared some of the trap, but he still needs your help.
Adwold is waiting for you to place the fish beneath the window. Adwold has shown you the perfect place to leave the bait for your trap: beneath the la…
Adwold is preparing to lie in wait for the creature to appear. You and Adwold must steel yourselves for the springing of the trap.
Adwold is hiding behind the makeshift cover Garbert constructed by his cottage. What was that sound? Adwold is certain he heard something -- could it …
Adwold has managed to catch up to you despite suffering a leg injury during the chase. Adwold is waiting to hear the results of the chase.
